title: Createless
description: A Faithless Addon that integrates the Create mod & some of its addons.
body:
This pack is designed to add Faithless support to the [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) Mod. Now you can enjoy all the fun textures of Faithless without having it clash with JAPPA textures

Some of the PLANNED addons to Create include

- [Steam n Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
- [Slice & Dice](https://modrinth.com/mod/slice-and-dice)
- [Enchantment Industry](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-enchantment-industry-fabric)
- [Create Big Cannons](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-big-cannons)
- [Create Extended Cogwheels](https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-cogwheels)

NOTE: If using Fabric/Quilt, DO NOT USE the latest version, try using Fabric API 0.88.1 and older if possible.

[Faithless](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/faithless) is created by [StitchSprites](https://modrinth.com/user/StitchSprites); Check out their other [PROJECTS](https://linktr.ee/stitch.sprites)
